# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

format_version: "2.1"

services:
  - name: service1
    url: http://microservice1:8000
    routes:
      - name: route1
        paths:
          - /endpoint1
        hosts:
          - api.example.com
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth

  - name: service2
    url: http://microservice2:8000
    routes:
      - name: route2
        paths:
          - /endpoint2
        hosts:
          - api.example.com
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting

upstreams:
  - name: microservice1
    targets:
      - target: microservice1:8000

  - name: microservice2
    targets:
      - target: microservice2:8000
    slots: 10
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        https_verify_certificate: false
